purpose: User-path release for the public Pylon homework-earning flow. Interactive pylon now opens the minimal homework dashboard, the dashboard starts and supervises the real earning worker, and Gemma diagnostics/downloads remain opt-in only.

readme_claims_checked: interactive pylon opens the homework dashboard and keeps the worker online
noninteractive pylon and pylon --config-path run the worker directly
Gemma diagnostics/downloads are optional and not part of homework onboarding
the dashboard starts and supervises the earning worker automatically

tests.reason: Whole-workspace format check is blocked by unrelated historical drift in deprecated Autopilot files. Targeted formatting was run for the touched packages.

observed: TUI started a child pylon worker automatically
worker listened on the configured local admin endpoint
worker log contained local Spark payout-destination creation
worker log contained online earning-loop startup
no models directory was created under the isolated Pylon home
after Ctrl-C the TUI-owned worker and listener were gone
follow_up_from_this_smoke: The first smoke still exposed raw closeout/status wording in the UI, so the release branch was patched before publishing.
The final published build hides transcript/composer, removes Gemma startup copy, and humanizes homework status labels.

ui_observed_before_assignment: Standing by for the next homework job
worker_log_observed: pylon: created local Spark payout destination for paid training work
pylon: node pylon is online; running default online earning loop
cleanup_observed: admin listener on 127.0.0.1:19471 was gone after shutdown
no models directory was created under the isolated Pylon home
caveats: This smoke proved TUI-managed worker startup, production work intake, local homework execution, and terminal local lease/window release state.

This smoke did not prove accepted-work payout settlement. Publication retries remained pending with failed-to-connect training relay errors, so this receipt must not replace the earlier full paid payout proof.

observed: bootstrap downloaded the official pylon-v0.1.11 darwin-arm64 asset
bootstrap did not run Gemma diagnostics by default
bootstrap did not create a models directory

release_assertions: Interactive pylon is now the public homework dashboard path.
The dashboard starts and supervises the local earning worker instead of only observing a separate process.
The visible TUI is reduced to status, homework run, work activity, earnings, wallet, rank, and node panels.
The composer/transcript/Gemma shell is hidden from the default user path.
No automatic Gemma download or diagnose path runs during npm bootstrap or homework onboarding.
Nexus minimum public earning version is 0.1.11.
